title: Subagent delegation context with objective-format-tools-boundaries
source: Anthropic multi-agent research system — 4 critical subagent components
description: Add explicit tool guidance and task boundary sections to agent prompts. Currently agents don't know which tools they can use or what files are off-limits.
proposed_changes: Add <available_tools> and <task_boundaries> sections to build_prompt(). Include safe-to-modify list from ticket metadata. Add target_files field to ticket schema.
